# Vectronomy

> Free XCS to SVG converter online and professional-grade browser-based vector editor for laser cutting, CNC, and digital fabrication.

## What is Vectronomy?

Vectronomy is a free online vector editor and XCS to SVG converter that runs entirely in your browser. It converts xTool Creative Space (.xcs) project files to clean, standards-compliant SVG files. Beyond conversion, it is a full-featured vector graphics editor — a free alternative to Adobe Illustrator and Inkscape that requires no downloads, no accounts, and no subscriptions.

## XCS to SVG Converter

Vectronomy is the only free online XCS to SVG converter. It lets you:
- **Open XCS files** without installing xTool Creative Space
- **Convert XCS to SVG** with full layer fidelity
- **View XCS files** directly in your browser
- **Export XCS projects** as SVG, PNG, or JPEG
- **Use XCS files** with other laser cutters (Lightburn, LaserGRBL, Glowforge, Epilog, etc.)

### How to convert XCS to SVG:
1. Open vectronomy.vercel.app in your browser
2. Drag and drop your .xcs file onto the workspace
3. Vectronomy parses and renders all vector layers
4. Click Export SVG to download clean, laser-ready vector files

### What is an XCS file?
XCS files are project files created by xTool Creative Space, the design software for xTool laser cutters and engravers. They contain vector layers, raster images, and machine settings in a proprietary format. Vectronomy is the only tool that can open and convert these files outside of xTool Creative Space.

## Online Vector Editor Features

### Drawing Tools
- **Bezier Pen Tool** — Create precise vector curves with anchor points and handles
- **Pencil Tool** — Freehand drawing with automatic path smoothing
- **Shape Tools** — Rectangle, circle, ellipse, polygon, star, spiral
- **Line Tools** — Line, polyline for precise straight segments
- **Brush & Eraser** — Variable-size brush and eraser with style options
- **Frame Tool** — Artboard management for multi-frame projects
- **Node Editor** — Direct manipulation of anchor points, handles, and path segments

### Path Operations
- **Unite** — Merge multiple shapes into one
- **Subtract** — Cut one shape from another
- **Intersect** — Keep only the overlapping area
- **Exclude** — Remove the overlap and keep the rest
- **Divide** — Split shapes at intersection points
- **Path Flattening** — Convert curves to approximated line segments
- **Path Reversal** — Reverse the direction of path segments

### Image Tracing (Raster to Vector)
- **Silhouette Trace** — Convert images to black/white vector outlines
- **Centerline Trace** — Extract skeletal center paths from images
- **Edge Detection** — High-pass edge detection for outline extraction
- **Posterization** — Multi-color layered vector output from photographs

### Fabrication & CNC Tools
- **Kerf Offset** — Compensate for laser beam width
- **Pocket Hatching** — Generate pocket clearing toolpaths
- **Chamfering** — Create chamfer/bevel toolpaths
- **Drill Conversion** — Convert circles to drill hole operations
- **Milling Tabs** — Add holding tabs for CNC milling
- **Concentric Hatching** — Generate concentric pocket clearing paths

### Layer Management
- Multi-layer workspace with named tabs
- Group and ungroup elements
- Lock layers to prevent editing
- Z-order controls (bring to front, send to back, forward, backward)
- Visual layer tree with color-coded groups

### Alignment & Layout
- Horizontal alignment: left, center, right
- Vertical alignment: top, middle, bottom
- Grid overlay with snap-to-grid
- Interactive rulers with mm and inch units
- Grid array creation for repeated patterns

### Export Formats
- **SVG** — Clean, standards-compliant scalable vector graphics
- **PNG** — High-resolution raster export at 2x
- **JPEG** — Compressed raster with white background
- **Source Text** — Raw SVG code as text file
- **Clipboard** — Copy SVG code directly
- **Multi-layer batch export** — Download all layers as separate SVG files

### Additional Features
- Full undo/redo with drawing-level history
- Dark mode and light mode with system theme detection
- Drag and drop file import (SVG, XCS, PNG, JPEG)
- Stroke and fill customization with color picker
- Opacity controls for stroke and fill
- Stroke cap and join settings
- Interactive onboarding tours
- Keyboard shortcuts for every tool
- Custom hotkey mapping

## Pages

- `/` — Main Studio (XCS converter + vector editor)
- `/roadmap` — Product roadmap with 140 planned features across 10 divisions
- `/help` — Interactive help center with tutorials and keyboard shortcuts

## Technical Details

- Built with TypeScript and Vite
- Client-side only — all processing happens in the browser, no server uploads
- Works in all modern browsers with HTML5, Canvas, and SVG support
- Open source, MIT Licensed
- No account or registration required

## Use Cases

- Convert xTool Creative Space XCS files to SVG
- Open XCS files without installing xTool software
- Create laser cutting designs from scratch
- Edit SVG files for CNC machining
- Design vinyl cutter files
- Create Cricut and Silhouette compatible SVGs
- Trace raster images to vector (logo vectorization, photo tracing)
- Design fabrication-ready technical drawings
- Create SVG icons and logos
- Boolean pathfinder operations for complex shapes
- Precision node editing for professional vector work

## Links

- Website: https://vectronomy.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/corned-dev/vectronomy
